docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PRASHANTH BALASUBRAMANIUM SET FOR AUG-02-2018 IS CONTINUED TO AUG-10-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND DID NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PRASHANTH BALASUBRAMANIUM IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF XILIN LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WISHES TO VACATE JUDGMENT. NO NEW TRIAL WILL BE ASSIGNED AS THE MATTER WILL IMMEDIATELY BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
